zh.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Childe於1631年5月22日出生在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 艾瑟爾包加時，他的父親Nathaniel Childe40歲，母親Isabell Treadway39歲。他於1662年3月30日與Mehitabel Dimmock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1694年11月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年63歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德法明頓普拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Childe于1631年5月22日出生在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 艾瑟爾包加时，他的父亲Nathaniel Childe40岁，母亲Isabell Treadway39岁。他于1662年3月30日与Mehitabel Dimmock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1694年11月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年63岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德法明頓普拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Childe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Childe was born on 22 May 1631, in London St Ethelburga, Middlesex, England, his father, Nathaniel Childe, was 40 and his mother, Isabell Treadway, was 39. He married Mehitabel Dimmock on 30 March 1662, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 November 1694, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63, and was buried in Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Childe est né le 22 mai 1631, à London St Ethelburga, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Nathaniel Childe, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabell Treadway, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Mehitabel Dimmock le 30 mars 1662, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1694, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Childe am 22. Mai 1631 in London St Ethelburga, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nathaniel Childe 40 und seine Mutter Isabell Treadway 39. Er hat am 30. März 1662 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mehitabel Dimmock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. November 1694 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Childe è nato il il 22 maggio 1631 nel London St Ethelburga, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Nathaniel Childe, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Isabell Treadway, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Mehitabel Dimmock il 30 marzo 1662, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 novembre 1694, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Childeが1631年5月22日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト エスエルブルガで生まれた時，父Nathaniel Childeは40歳，母Isabell Treadwayは39歳であった。1662年3月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでMehitabel Dimmockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1694年11月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで63歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードファルミントンプレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 패밍턴 플레이스

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Childe(이)가 1631년 5월 22일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 테버가에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nathaniel Childe(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell Treadway(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1662년 3월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 Mehitabel Dimmock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1694년 11월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 패밍턴 플레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Childe nasceu em 22 de maio de 1631, em London St Ethelburga, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nathaniel Childe, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Treadway, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Mehitabel Dimmock em 30 de março de 1662, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1694, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Childe родился 22 мая 1631 г. в местности лондон ст этелбурга, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Nathaniel Childe было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Treadway, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Mehitabel Dimmock 30 марта 1662 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 ноября 1694 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности плеис, фармингтон, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Childe nació el 22 de mayo de 1631, en London St Ethelburga, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Nathaniel Childe, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Isabell Treadway, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Mehitabel Dimmock el 30 de marzo de 1662, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1694, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Place, Farmington, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.
